purpose: Interactive physics learning suite from Newtonian mechanics to astrophysics, cosmology, wormholes, and causality.

A.title: 数学与模拟基本功
A.goal: Build the numerical and visualization primitives used everywhere else.

B.title: 经典力学与轨道
B.goal: Build intuition for forces, conservation laws, gravity, orbits, and N-body dynamics.

C.title: 波、光、热与恒星
C.goal: Understand how astronomical information comes from light and how stars work.

D.title: 狭义相对论
D.goal: Understand spacetime, time dilation, proper time, and causal structure in flat spacetime.

E.title: 广义相对论前置
E.goal: Convert the intuition of gravity from force to geometry.

F.title: 黑洞与强引力
F.goal: Use metrics, horizons, and geodesic intuition to model black holes.

G.title: 引力波与双星系统
G.goal: Connect compact-object dynamics to observable spacetime waves.

H.title: 宇宙学
H.goal: Treat the whole universe as a dynamical system.

I.title: 虫洞、时间旅行与因果结构
I.goal: Model wormholes and time-travel ideas as metric, energy-condition, and causal-graph problems.

apps.name: Cosmic Scale Explorer
apps.mvp: Log-scale explorer from atomic scale to observable-universe scale with unit conversions.
challenges: Find the scale gap between Earth and Sun
Place AU, ly, pc on the scale
tests: unit conversions are reversible within tolerance
known constants match expected significant figures

apps.name: Vector Field Playground
apps.mvp: A 2D canvas where users drag a particle and see position/velocity/acceleration vectors and coordinate transforms.
tests: vector norms and dot products are correct

apps.name: Slope Field Lab
apps.mvp: Plot dx/dt=f(x,t) and integrate trajectories from clicked initial conditions.
tests: Euler error decreases with smaller dt

apps.name: Integrator Battle Arena
apps.mvp: Run the same orbit or harmonic oscillator with several integrators and plot energy error over time.
challenges: Find dt where RK4 is stable
Show why symplectic methods help orbital simulations

apps.name: Force Sandbox
apps.mvp: 2D particle world with configurable forces: constant, spring, damping, gravity-like attraction.
challenges: Reach a target with a constant force
Tune damping to stop at target

apps.name: Conservation Detective
apps.mvp: Collision simulator that reports total momentum and energy before/after collisions.

apps.name: Action Minimizer
apps.mvp: Users drag path control points between two events and see the action integral change.
challenges: Compare free particle vs harmonic oscillator
Explain why straight path wins for free particle
tests: free-particle straight path has lower action

apps.name: Gravity Well Simulator
apps.mvp: Launch particles around a central mass and classify fall, ellipse, parabola, or hyperbola behavior.

apps.name: Kepler Law Verifier
apps.mvp: Adjust semi-major axis and eccentricity, then verify equal-area law and T^2 proportional to a^3.
tests: T^2/a^3 constant for fixed central mass

apps.name: Mini Solar System Engine
apps.mvp: Simulate Sun-Earth-Moon first, then allow adding Jupiter and custom bodies.
challenges: Keep Earth orbit stable for one year
tests: center of mass constant without external forces
energy drift below target for small dt

apps.name: Tidal Force Explorer
apps.mvp: Show near-side/far-side gravitational differences as a body approaches a massive object.

apps.name: Wave Tank
apps.mvp: Finite-difference 1D/2D wave simulation with sources, barriers, and slits.
challenges: Find unstable dt and explain why

apps.name: Spectrum Decomposer
apps.mvp: Users draw waveforms; app computes and displays frequency spectrum via FFT.

apps.name: Doppler Shift Visualizer
apps.mvp: Move a star relative to observer and watch spectral lines shift in real time.
challenges: Toggle classical vs relativistic at high v
tests: relativistic formula approaches classical for low v

apps.name: Blackbody Color Lab
apps.mvp: Slider for temperature; plot spectrum and approximate perceived star color.
challenges: Find peak wavelength for the Sun
Compare red dwarf and blue star
tests: Planck values finite for valid inputs

apps.name: Gas Particle Simulator
apps.mvp: Particles collide in a box; histogram velocities and compute temperature/pressure.

apps.name: Fusion Energy Budget
apps.mvp: Simplified core model showing how tiny mass defect produces large energy release.
challenges: Estimate energy from 1 kg mass defect
Increase temperature and see rate effect

apps.name: Star Balance Simulator
apps.mvp: Layered spherical star toy model: gravity inward, pressure outward, stable/expand/collapse status.

apps.name: HR Diagram Explorer
apps.mvp: Plot stars by temperature and luminosity; animate simplified evolution tracks for different masses.
challenges: Compare lifetime of massive and low-mass stars

apps.name: Light Clock Simulator
apps.mvp: Compare a stationary light clock and moving light clock with path-length geometry.

apps.name: Lorentz Transformer
apps.mvp: Input events and velocity; display transformed coordinates and tilted spacetime grid.
challenges: Make two events simultaneous in one frame

apps.name: Spacetime Diagram Editor
apps.mvp: Users draw events and worldlines; app classifies intervals and causal reachability.

apps.name: Proper Time Race
apps.mvp: Two travelers follow different worldlines and reunite; app computes elapsed proper time.
tests: straight inertial path maximizes proper time between timelike events

apps.name: Relativistic Rocket Lab
apps.mvp: Continuous acceleration model showing speed approaching but not exceeding light speed.
challenges: Compare proper and coordinate acceleration toy models

apps.name: Einstein Elevator
apps.mvp: Elevator scenarios: resting on Earth, accelerating in space, and free-falling.

apps.name: Geodesic on Surfaces
apps.mvp: Launch particles on sphere, saddle, and torus surfaces along geodesic paths.
challenges: Compare Euclidean straightness vs surface straightness

apps.name: Metric Playground
apps.mvp: Choose a metric and see how the same coordinate difference has different length/interval.

apps.name: Tensor Transformation Lab
apps.mvp: Transform vector/tensor components under rotations, scalings, and Lorentz boosts while invariant quantities remain fixed.
challenges: Show components change under basis change
Use Lorentz boost and preserve interval

apps.name: Parallel Transport Game
apps.mvp: Move an arrow around a closed path on a sphere and show it returns rotated.
challenges: Increase enclosed area and observe angle

apps.name: Curvature-Matter Sandbox
apps.mvp: Conceptual toy model: draw energy density and see a generated curvature/potential field; particles follow geodesic-like paths.
challenges: Explain why this is not full GR

apps.name: Black Hole Orbit Lab
apps.mvp: Show orbits around a Schwarzschild black hole with horizon radius and basic orbit classes.

apps.name: Gravity Clock Comparator
apps.mvp: Place clocks at different radii around a black hole and compare tick rates for a far observer.

apps.name: Gravitational Lens Renderer
apps.mvp: Background star field distorted by a central mass using approximate ray deflection.
challenges: Compare ray overlay and rendered distortion

apps.name: Accretion Disk Simulator
apps.mvp: Particles orbit a black hole; simple viscosity causes inspiral and heating color changes.
tests: with zero viscosity angular momentum roughly conserved

apps.name: Frame Dragging Explorer
apps.mvp: Conceptual visualization of rotating black hole dragging nearby trajectories as spin changes.
challenges: Explain why this is a toy model
tests: zero spin reduces to non-rotating view

apps.name: Horizon Thermodynamics Toy Model
apps.mvp: Concept panel showing black hole mass, horizon area, temperature, and evaporation-time scale.
challenges: Compare stellar vs tiny black hole
tests: evaporation time increases with mass cubed

apps.name: Binary Inspiral Simulator
apps.mvp: Two compact objects orbit and slowly inspiral under a simplified energy-loss term.
tests: center of mass stays fixed without loss

apps.name: Gravitational Wave Chirp Lab
apps.mvp: Generate a simplified chirp waveform from masses and play/plot the signal.

apps.name: LIGO Signal Hunter
apps.mvp: Hide a chirp in noisy data; users choose templates and find correlation peaks.

apps.name: Galaxy Distribution Viewer
apps.mvp: Random/clustered galaxy field that appears structured locally and smoother when averaged over larger scales.
challenges: Find scale where distribution looks homogeneous
tests: density average converges for random distribution

apps.name: Expanding Grid Universe
apps.mvp: Grid expands with scale factor a(t), showing galaxies fixed in comoving coordinates while proper distances grow.
challenges: Explain why galaxies are not flying through local space

apps.name: Universe Equation Solver
apps.mvp: Solve simplified Friedmann equation for a(t) from Ω parameters and plot past/future expansion.

apps.name: Cosmic Redshift Calculator
apps.mvp: Input redshift z; output scale factor, approximate lookback time, and distance from selected cosmology.

apps.name: CMB Pixel Universe
apps.mvp: Generate a sphere/2D map of small temperature fluctuations with adjustable large/small scale power.
tests: power sliders affect variance by band

apps.name: Galaxy Rotation Curve Lab
apps.mvp: Compute rotation curves from visible matter alone and with a dark-matter halo.

apps.name: Dark Energy Slider
apps.mvp: Adjust ΩΛ and observe future scale-factor acceleration/deceleration.
tests: higher ΩΛ increases late-time expansion rate

apps.name: Cosmic Timeline Builder
apps.mvp: Interactive logarithmic timeline from early universe to today with cards and linked mini simulations.

apps.name: Wormhole Taxonomy Explorer
apps.mvp: Compare three wormhole-like concepts and label traversability, stability, and exotic-matter requirements.

apps.name: Wormhole Metric Builder
apps.mvp: Choose shape/redshift functions and visualize throat geometry plus basic validity checks.

apps.name: Embedding Diagram Renderer
apps.mvp: Three.js surface rendering of a wormhole spatial slice with adjustable throat radius.

apps.name: Energy Condition Checker
apps.mvp: Compute simplified energy-condition flags for selected wormhole toy functions.
tests: known toy function violates expected condition

apps.name: Traversability Stress Test
apps.mvp: Simulate a traveler path through a wormhole and flag excessive tidal acceleration in a toy model.
tests: stress decreases with larger throat heuristic

apps.name: Wormhole Time Machine Lab
apps.mvp: Two wormhole mouths; one is moved relativistically to create time offset. App checks whether a signal loop returns to its own past.
tests: time dilation offset grows with speed/duration

apps.name: Causality Loop Detector
apps.mvp: Users create events and causal links; app detects cycles and labels causality violations.

apps.name: Paradox Simulator
apps.mvp: Model causal rules as Boolean constraints and check whether any self-consistent history exists.

apps.name: Chronology Protection Toy Model
apps.mvp: Conceptual graph: as CTC threshold approaches, toy field energy diverges or grows sharply.
challenges: Explain why this is not proof

apps.name: Negative Energy Sandbox
apps.mvp: Toy Casimir-style panel: plate separation changes a conceptual negative energy density plot; explicitly labels limitations.
challenges: Decrease separation and observe energy magnitude
Explain why microscopic effects don't imply macroscopic wormholes
